grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)
planes: contract · governed modules: 2 · ungoverned: 0

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [contract.breaking-event] app/Orders (app/Orders/events/OrderPlaced.json:5) — module app/Orders's event contract removes OrderPlaced.total at app/Orders/events/OrderPlaced.json:5, which the analytics consumer depends on — restore it or run `grip ratify contract app/Orders` to accept the new contract once event consumers are updated.
